title: NeuronAgentCard
description: Private/internal A2A-shaped capability manifest ('Agent Card') for a Neuron orchestrator, scope guard, intent classifier, specialist head, or goal agent (ADR-027 §4, F0038-S0001). F0038 stores these as versioned, code-reviewed source assets under neuron/crm_agents/; they are NOT database authoring rows (ADR-027 §9). agent_runs/provenance persist only a reference (id + version + content_hash). Public Agent Card discovery and external federation are deferred (no public surface in F0038).

card_id.description: Stable capability id, e.g. neuron.orchestrator, crm.scope_guard, crm.renewals.head, crm.renewals.outreach_drafter.

card_version.description: Semantic version of this manifest; referenced (with content_hash) from agent_runs for replay.

kind.description: Role of this agent in the A2A-aligned internal profile.

active.description: false for a stub specialist head that returns an inactive zone payload (F0038-S0004).

capabilities.description: Declared skills this agent can perform; referenced by YAML plan steps.

accepted_output_modes.description: Envelope part types this agent may produce (aligns with neuron-message-envelope.schema.json).

tools.description: Registered tool/MCP names this agent may invoke. Every name must resolve in the tool registry (F0038-S0001).

auth_mode.description: user_token = forwards the caller's authentik token to the engine (default for CRM-data agents, ADR-027 §8); service_identity reserved for machine-owned ops; none for pure-LLM agents that touch no engine data.

delegates_to.description: card_ids this agent may delegate A2A tasks to (e.g. a head delegating to a goal agent).

public.description: Must be false in F0038. Exposing a public Agent Card requires a later ADR amendment (ADR-027 §2).
